signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 annual CPI inflation confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 annual CPI inflation confirmed at 2.16% (up from 2.00% in Feb), updated April 2, 2026** | NO | MED confidence[2]

South Korea's Statistics Korea released March 2026 CPI data showing year-over-year **annual inflation at 2.16%**, a 0.16-point rise from February's 2.00%, with month-to-month inflation at 0.34% (CPI: 118.8); next update due May 6, 2026[2]. No releases since April
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
